title: SOL Tribes
description: Give players the ability to create tribes.
body:
Key Features for the Tribes Mod:

**Tribes Table:** Craft and place the Tribes Table to get started. Once activated by three players, you can create a tribe, name it, write a description, and add a Discord link for your community. Customize your tribe’s identity by placing your own custom banner as the tribe's flag icon.

**Settlements:** Enchant a flag using the Tribes Table to establish your tribe's settlement. You can place up to two settlements by default, with an additional slot granted for every three players in your tribe. Each settlement is marked by the flag, which will notify all players in the region of its presence.

**Settlement Effects:** Customize each settlement with a beneficial effect emanating from the flag within a 200-block radius. These effects are designed to aid in your building and crafting processes, enhancing the efficiency and enjoyment of your tribe's activities.
